title: The 2024 voluntary scheme for branded medicines pricing, access and growth: payment percentage for 2026
body: "The 2024 voluntary scheme headline payment percentage for 2026 will be 14.5%. This document sets out how the level was set.  The 2024 voluntary scheme for branded medicines pricing, access and growth (VPAG) is a voluntary agreement between the Department of Health and Social Care (DHSC), NHS England and the Association of the British Pharmaceutical Industry (ABPI).  The voluntary scheme aims to:   promote better patient outcomes and a healthier population support UK economic growth contribute to a financially sustainable NHS  "
